---
title: "Faq"
output: html_document
---

# Frequently Asked Questions and Tips

## Frequently asked questions

Can [<u>Projects</u>](#project) include multiple methods?

- Yes, [<u>Projects</u>](#project) can include multiple methods.

Can [<u>Syntheses</u>](#synthesis) include multiple methods?

- No, [<u>Synthesis</u>](#synthesis) must only contain one method. Separate [<u>Syntheses</u>](#synthesis) must be made for different methods.

If I am uploading for someone else what information do I need to get from the custodian?

- [<u>Here</u>](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1gtMNcZZqBqG3ylUPD68KqdbANHUKfVJ0XXHdkySHXRk/edit?gid=0#gid=0) is a spreadsheet to get the custodian to fill out

## Tips

- Light and Dark Mode: In the top right corner of the landing page you can click the ☼ to switch between light and dark mode

#
